raw_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT 
    t.id AS movie_id,
    mii.info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx mii
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
  WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = 1
),
runtime_info AS (
  SELECT movie_id, MAX(info::int) AS runtime
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
    AND info ~ '^\d+$'
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
genre_prestige AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Biography','History','War','Animation','Documentary') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_prestige_genre,
    MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Horror','Action','Thriller') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_low_genre
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
company_size AS (
  SELECT mc.movie_id, MAX(cnt.total) AS max_company_size
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN (
    SELECT company_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS total
    FROM movie_companies
    WHERE company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
    GROUP BY company_id
  ) cnt ON cnt.company_id = mc.company_id
  WHERE mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN ri.runtime >= 120 THEN 'long(120+)' ELSE 'shorter' END AS runtime_cat,
  CASE WHEN gp.is_prestige_genre = 1 THEN 'prestige' WHEN gp.is_low_genre = 1 THEN 'low' ELSE 'mid' END AS genre_cat,
  CASE WHEN cs.max_company_size >= 100 THEN 'major(100+)' ELSE 'indie/mid' END AS company_cat,
  COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
  round(AVG(b.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  round(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY b.rating)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN runtime_info ri ON ri.movie_id = b.movie_id
LEFT JOIN genre_prestige gp ON gp.movie_id = b.movie_id
LEFT JOIN company_size cs ON cs.movie_id = b.movie_id
WHERE ri.runtime IS NOT NULL AND gp.is_prestige_genre IS NOT NULL AND cs.max_company_size IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY runtime_cat, genre_cat, company_cat
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT 
    t.id AS movie_id,
    mii.info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx mii
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
  WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = 1
),
runtime_info AS (
  SELECT movie_id, MAX(info::int) AS runtime
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
    AND info ~ '^\d+$'
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
genre_prestige AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Biography','History','War','Animation','Documentary') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_prestige_genre,
    MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Horror','Action','Thriller') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_low_genre
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
company_size AS (
  SELECT mc.movie_id, MAX(cnt.total) AS max_company_size
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN (
    SELECT company_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS total
    FROM movie_companies
    WHERE company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
    GROUP BY company_id
  ) cnt ON cnt.company_id = mc.company_id
  WHERE mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN ri.runtime >= 120 THEN 'long(120+)' ELSE 'shorter' END AS runtime_cat,
  CASE WHEN gp.is_prestige_genre = 1 THEN 'prestige' WHEN gp.is_low_genre = 1 THEN 'low' ELSE 'mid' END AS genre_cat,
  CASE WHEN cs.max_company_size >= 100 THEN 'major(100+)' ELSE 'indie/mid' END AS company_cat,
  COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
  round(AVG(b.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  round(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY b.rating)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN runtime_info ri ON ri.movie_id = b.movie_id
LEFT JOIN genre_prestige gp ON gp.movie_id = b.movie_id
LEFT JOIN company_size cs ON cs.movie_id = b.movie_id
WHERE ri.runtime IS NOT NULL AND gp.is_prestige_genre IS NOT NULL AND cs.max_company_size IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY runtime_cat, genre_cat, company_cat
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT 
    t.id AS movie_id,
    mii.info::numeric AS rating,
    (mii.info::numeric >= 7.0)::int AS is_high
  FROM movie_info_idx mii
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
  WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = 1
),
runtime_data AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    CASE WHEN MAX(info::int) >= 120 THEN 'long(120+)' ELSE 'shorter' END AS cat
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes') AND info ~ '^\d+$'
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
genre_data AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Biography','History','War','Animation','Documentary') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'prestige'
         WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Horror','Action','Thriller') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'low'
         ELSE 'mid' END AS cat
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
company_data AS (
  SELECT mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN MAX(cnt.total) >= 100 THEN 'major(100+)' ELSE 'indie/mid' END AS cat
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN (SELECT company_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS total FROM movie_companies
        WHERE company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
        GROUP BY company_id) cnt ON cnt.company_id = mc.company_id
  WHERE mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
)
SELECT 
  'runtime' AS factor,
  rd.cat AS category,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  round(AVG(b.is_high)*100, 1) AS pct_high_rated,
  round(AVG(b.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating
FROM base b JOIN runtime_data rd ON rd.movie_id = b.movie_id
GROUP BY rd.cat
UNION ALL
SELECT 'genre', gd.cat, COUNT(*), round(AVG(b.is_high)*100,1), round(AVG(b.rating)::numeric,3)
FROM base b JOIN genre_data gd ON gd.movie_id = b.movie_id
GROUP BY gd.cat
UNION ALL
SELECT 'company_size', cd.cat, COUNT(*), round(AVG(b.is_high)*100,1), round(AVG(b.rating)::numeric,3)
FROM base b JOIN company_data cd ON cd.movie_id = b.movie_id
GROUP BY cd.cat
ORDER BY factor, pct_high_rated DESC;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT t.id AS movie_id, mii.info::numeric AS rating,
    (mii.info::numeric >= 7.0)::int AS is_high
  FROM movie_info_idx mii
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
  WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = 1
),
prestige_keywords AS (
  SELECT mk.movie_id, 1 AS has_prestige_kw
  FROM movie_keyword mk
  JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
  WHERE k.keyword IN (
    'tears','crying','dying','poverty','execution','sadness','tragic-event',
    'archive-footage','no-opening-credits','1940s','1990s','typewriter','reading'
  )
  GROUP BY mk.movie_id
),
runtime_data AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    CASE WHEN MAX(info::int) >= 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_long
  FROM movie_info WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes') AND info ~ '^\d+$'
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
genre_data AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Biography','History','War','Animation','Documentary') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_prestige
  FROM movie_info WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(rd.is_long, 0) AS long_runtime,
  COALESCE(gd.is_prestige, 0) AS prestige_genre,
  COALESCE(pk.has_prestige_kw, 0) AS prestige_keywords,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  round(AVG(b.is_high)*100, 1) AS pct_high_rated,
  round(AVG(b.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN runtime_data rd ON rd.movie_id = b.movie_id
LEFT JOIN genre_data gd ON gd.movie_id = b.movie_id
LEFT JOIN prestige_keywords pk ON pk.movie_id = b.movie_id
WHERE rd.is_long IS NOT NULL AND gd.is_prestige IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY COALESCE(rd.is_long,0), COALESCE(gd.is_prestige,0), COALESCE(pk.has_prestige_kw,0)
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT t.id AS movie_id, mii.info::numeric AS rating,
    (mii.info::numeric >= 7.0)::int AS is_high
  FROM movie_info_idx mii
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
  WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = 1
),
prestige_keywords AS (
  SELECT mk.movie_id, 1 AS has_prestige_kw
  FROM movie_keyword mk
  JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
  WHERE k.keyword IN (
    'tears','crying','dying','poverty','execution','sadness','tragic-event',
    'archive-footage','no-opening-credits','1940s','1990s','typewriter','reading'
  )
  GROUP BY mk.movie_id
),
runtime_data AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    CASE WHEN MAX(info::int) >= 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_long
  FROM movie_info WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes') AND info ~ '^\d+$'
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
genre_data AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Biography','History','War','Animation','Documentary') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_prestige
  FROM movie_info WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(rd.is_long, 0) AS long_runtime,
  COALESCE(gd.is_prestige, 0) AS prestige_genre,
  COALESCE(pk.has_prestige_kw, 0) AS prestige_keywords,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  round(AVG(b.is_high)*100, 1) AS pct_high_rated,
  round(AVG(b.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN runtime_data rd ON rd.movie_id = b.movie_id
LEFT JOIN genre_data gd ON gd.movie_id = b.movie_id
LEFT JOIN prestige_keywords pk ON pk.movie_id = b.movie_id
WHERE rd.is_long IS NOT NULL AND gd.is_prestige IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY COALESCE(rd.is_long,0), COALESCE(gd.is_prestige,0), COALESCE(pk.has_prestige_kw,0)
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

WITH director_roles AS (
  SELECT id AS role_id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'
),
actor_roles AS (
  SELECT id AS role_id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')
),
directors AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN director_roles dr ON ci.role_id = dr.role_id
),
actors AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.role_id
),
collab AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count
  FROM directors d
  JOIN actors a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND d.director_id <> a.actor_id
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director_name,
  na.name AS actor_name,
  c.film_count
FROM collab c
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = c.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = c.actor_id
ORDER BY c.film_count DESC
LIMIT 40;

WITH director_roles AS (
  SELECT id AS role_id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'
),
actor_roles AS (
  SELECT id AS role_id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')
),
directors AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN director_roles dr ON ci.role_id = dr.role_id
),
actors AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.role_id
),
collab AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count
  FROM directors d
  JOIN actors a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND d.director_id <> a.actor_id
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director_name,
  na.name AS actor_name,
  c.film_count
FROM collab c
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = c.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = c.actor_id
ORDER BY c.film_count DESC
LIMIT 40;

WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
     actor_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
     genre_type AS (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres'),
     -- Focus on well-known international theatrical pairs with high film counts
     pairs AS (
       SELECT nd.name AS director_name, na.name AS actor_name,
              ci_d.person_id AS director_id, ci_a.person_id AS actor_id,
              t.id AS movie_id
       FROM cast_info ci_d
       JOIN cast_info ci_a ON ci_a.movie_id = ci_d.movie_id
       JOIN name nd ON nd.id = ci_d.person_id
       JOIN name na ON na.id = ci_a.person_id
       JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_d.movie_id AND t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
       WHERE ci_d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM director_role)
         AND ci_a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_role)
         AND ci_d.person_id <> ci_a.person_id
         AND nd.name IN ('To, Johnnie', 'Wong, Jing', 'Miike, Takashi', 'Priyadarshan', 'de Oliveira, Manoel')
     ),
     pair_genres AS (
       SELECT p.director_name, p.actor_name, mi.info AS genre, COUNT(*) AS cnt
       FROM pairs p
       JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = p.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM genre_type)
       GROUP BY p.director_name, p.actor_name, mi.info
     ),
     pair_totals AS (
       SELECT director_name, actor_name, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS total_films
       FROM pairs
       GROUP BY director_name, actor_name
       HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) >= 5
     )
SELECT pg.director_name, pg.actor_name, pt.total_films,
       pg.genre, pg.cnt,
       ROUND(pg.cnt * 100.0 / pt.total_films, 0) AS pct_of_films
FROM pair_genres pg
JOIN pair_totals pt ON pt.director_name = pg.director_name AND pt.actor_name = pg.actor_name
ORDER BY pt.total_films DESC, pg.cnt DESC;

WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
     actor_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
     pairs AS (
       SELECT nd.name AS director_name, na.name AS actor_name,
              t.id AS movie_id
       FROM cast_info ci_d
       JOIN cast_info ci_a ON ci_a.movie_id = ci_d.movie_id
       JOIN name nd ON nd.id = ci_d.person_id
       JOIN name na ON na.id = ci_a.person_id
       JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_d.movie_id AND t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
       WHERE ci_d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM director_role)
         AND ci_a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_role)
         AND ci_d.person_id <> ci_a.person_id
         AND nd.name IN ('To, Johnnie', 'Wong, Jing', 'Miike, Takashi', 'de Oliveira, Manoel', 'Priyadarshan')
     ),
     pair_totals AS (
       SELECT director_name, actor_name, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS total_films
       FROM pairs GROUP BY director_name, actor_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) >= 5
     ),
     pair_companies AS (
       SELECT p.director_name, p.actor_name, cn.name AS company, COUNT(*) AS cnt
       FROM pairs p
       JOIN pair_totals pt ON pt.director_name = p.director_name AND pt.actor_name = p.actor_name
       JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = p.movie_id
       JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
       JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id AND ct.kind = 'production companies'
       GROUP BY p.director_name, p.actor_name, cn.name
       HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
     )
SELECT pc.director_name, pc.actor_name, pt.total_films,
       pc.company, pc.cnt,
       ROUND(pc.cnt * 100.0 / pt.total_films, 0) AS pct_of_films
FROM pair_companies pc
JOIN pair_totals pt ON pt.director_name = pc.director_name AND pt.actor_name = pc.actor_name
ORDER BY pt.total_films DESC, pc.cnt DESC
LIMIT 40;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
pairs AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count,
         array_agg(t.title ORDER BY t.production_year) AS titles
  FROM dirs d
  JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id AND d.director_id != a.actor_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 8
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director,
  na.name AS actor,
  p.film_count,
  p.titles[1:5] AS sample_titles
FROM pairs p
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = p.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = p.actor_id
ORDER BY p.film_count DESC
LIMIT 25;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
pairs AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count,
         array_agg(t.title ORDER BY t.production_year) AS titles
  FROM dirs d
  JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id AND d.director_id != a.actor_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 8
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director,
  na.name AS actor,
  p.film_count,
  p.titles[1:5] AS sample_titles
FROM pairs p
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = p.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = p.actor_id
ORDER BY p.film_count DESC
LIMIT 25;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
pairs AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS film_count
  FROM dirs d
  JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id AND d.director_id != a.actor_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
    AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'countries')
    AND mi.info IN ('USA', 'UK', 'France', 'Germany', 'Italy', 'Spain', 'Australia', 'Canada')
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) >= 5
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director,
  na.name AS actor,
  p.film_count
FROM pairs p
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = p.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = p.actor_id
ORDER BY p.film_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
pairs AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS film_count
  FROM dirs d
  JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id AND d.director_id != a.actor_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
    AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'countries')
    AND mi.info IN ('USA', 'UK', 'France', 'Germany', 'Italy', 'Spain', 'Australia', 'Canada')
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) >= 5
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director,
  na.name AS actor,
  p.film_count
FROM pairs p
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = p.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = p.actor_id
ORDER BY p.film_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
rated_movies AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT movie_id
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    AND info::integer >= 500
),
target_pairs AS (
  SELECT nd.id AS dir_id, na.id AS act_id, nd.name AS director, na.name AS actor
  FROM name nd, name na
  WHERE (nd.name, na.name) IN (
    ('To, Johnnie', 'Lam, Suet'),
    ('Marshall, Garry', 'Elizondo, Hector'),
    ('Egoyan, Atom', 'Khanjian, Arsinée'),
    ('Kitano, Takeshi', 'Terajima, Susumu'),
    ('Rodriguez, Robert', 'Trejo, Danny')
  )
),
shared_movies AS (
  SELECT tp.director, tp.actor, d.movie_id
  FROM target_pairs tp
  JOIN dirs d ON d.director_id = tp.dir_id
  JOIN acts a ON a.actor_id = tp.act_id AND a.movie_id = d.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN rated_movies rm ON rm.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010 AND t.kind_id = 1
),
keyword_stats AS (
  SELECT sm.director, sm.actor,
         k.keyword,
         COUNT(DISTINCT sm.movie_id) AS kw_count
  FROM shared_movies sm
  JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = sm.movie_id
  JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
  GROUP BY sm.director, sm.actor, k.keyword
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT sm.movie_id) >= 2
)
SELECT director, actor, keyword, kw_count
FROM keyword_stats
ORDER BY director, kw_count DESC, keyword
LIMIT 50;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
rated_movies AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT movie_id
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    AND info::integer >= 500
),
target_pairs AS (
  SELECT nd.id AS dir_id, na.id AS act_id, nd.name AS director, na.name AS actor
  FROM name nd, name na
  WHERE (nd.name, na.name) IN (
    ('To, Johnnie', 'Lam, Suet'),
    ('Marshall, Garry', 'Elizondo, Hector'),
    ('Kitano, Takeshi', 'Terajima, Susumu'),
    ('Rodriguez, Robert', 'Trejo, Danny')
  )
),
shared_movies AS (
  SELECT tp.director, tp.actor, d.movie_id
  FROM target_pairs tp
  JOIN dirs d ON d.director_id = tp.dir_id
  JOIN acts a ON a.actor_id = tp.act_id AND a.movie_id = d.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN rated_movies rm ON rm.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010 AND t.kind_id = 1
),
keyword_stats AS (
  SELECT sm.director, sm.actor,
         k.keyword,
         COUNT(DISTINCT sm.movie_id) AS kw_count
  FROM shared_movies sm
  JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = sm.movie_id
  JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
  GROUP BY sm.director, sm.actor, k.keyword
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT sm.movie_id) >= 2
)
SELECT director, actor, keyword, kw_count
FROM keyword_stats
ORDER BY director, kw_count DESC, keyword
LIMIT 60;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
rated_movies AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT movie_id
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    AND info::integer >= 500
),
target_pairs AS (
  SELECT nd.id AS dir_id, na.id AS act_id, nd.name AS director, na.name AS actor
  FROM name nd, name na
  WHERE (nd.name, na.name) IN (
    ('To, Johnnie', 'Lam, Suet'),
    ('Marshall, Garry', 'Elizondo, Hector'),
    ('Rodriguez, Robert', 'Trejo, Danny')
  )
),
shared_movies AS (
  SELECT tp.director, tp.actor, d.movie_id
  FROM target_pairs tp
  JOIN dirs d ON d.director_id = tp.dir_id
  JOIN acts a ON a.actor_id = tp.act_id AND a.movie_id = d.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN rated_movies rm ON rm.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010 AND t.kind_id = 1
),
keyword_stats AS (
  SELECT sm.director, sm.actor,
         k.keyword,
         COUNT(DISTINCT sm.movie_id) AS kw_count
  FROM shared_movies sm
  JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = sm.movie_id
  JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
  GROUP BY sm.director, sm.actor, k.keyword
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT sm.movie_id) >= 2
)
SELECT director, actor, keyword, kw_count
FROM keyword_stats
ORDER BY director, kw_count DESC, keyword
LIMIT 60;

WITH franchise_ids AS (
  SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year,
    CASE 
      WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 'Halloween') AND t.production_year IN (1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009) THEN 'Halloween'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa') THEN 'Rocky'
      WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6', 'Furious 7') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
    END AS franchise,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 
      CASE 
        WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 'Halloween') AND t.production_year IN (1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009) THEN 'Halloween'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa') THEN 'Rocky'
        WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6', 'Furious 7') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
      END
      ORDER BY t.production_year) AS installment_nr
  FROM title t
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year >= 1980
),
franchise_cast AS (
  SELECT fi.franchise, fi.movie_id, fi.title, fi.production_year, fi.installment_nr,
         ci.person_id
  FROM franchise_ids fi
  JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = fi.movie_id
  JOIN role_type rt ON rt.id = ci.role_id AND rt.role IN ('actor', 'actress')
  WHERE fi.franchise IS NOT NULL
),
-- For each consecutive pair, compute cast overlap
installment_pairs AS (
  SELECT 
    f1.franchise,
    f1.installment_nr AS inst1,
    f2.installment_nr AS inst2,
    f1.title AS title1,
    f2.title AS title2,
    f1.production_year AS year1,
    f2.production_year AS year2,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f1.person_id) AS cast_size_1,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f2.person_id) AS cast_size_2,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f1.person_id = f2.person_id THEN f1.person_id END) AS shared_cast
  FROM franchise_cast f1
  JOIN franchise_cast f2 ON f2.franchise = f1.franchise 
    AND f2.installment_nr = f1.installment_nr + 1
  GROUP BY f1.franchise, f1.installment_nr, f2.installment_nr, f1.title, f2.title, f1.production_year, f2.production_year
)
SELECT franchise, inst1, inst2, title1, year1, title2, year2,
       cast_size_1, cast_size_2, shared_cast,
       ROUND(100.0 * shared_cast / NULLIF(LEAST(cast_size_1, cast_size_2), 0), 1) AS retention_pct
FROM installment_pairs
ORDER BY franchise, inst1;

WITH franchise_ids AS (
  SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year,
    CASE 
      WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 'Halloween') AND t.production_year IN (1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009) THEN 'Halloween'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa') THEN 'Rocky'
      WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
    END AS franchise,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 
      CASE 
        WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 'Halloween') AND t.production_year IN (1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009) THEN 'Halloween'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa') THEN 'Rocky'
        WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
      END
      ORDER BY t.production_year) AS installment_nr
  FROM title t
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year >= 1980
),
franchise_cast AS (
  SELECT fi.franchise, fi.movie_id, fi.title, fi.production_year, fi.installment_nr,
         ci.person_id
  FROM franchise_ids fi
  JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = fi.movie_id
  JOIN role_type rt ON rt.id = ci.role_id AND rt.role IN ('actor', 'actress')
  WHERE fi.franchise IS NOT NULL
),
installment_pairs AS (
  SELECT 
    f1.franchise,
    f2.title AS sequel_title,
    f2.production_year AS sequel_year,
    f2.movie_id AS sequel_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f1.person_id) AS cast_size_1,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f2.person_id) AS cast_size_2,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f1.person_id = f2.person_id THEN f1.person_id END) AS shared_cast,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f1.person_id = f2.person_id THEN f1.person_id END) 
          / NULLIF(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT f1.person_id), COUNT(DISTINCT f2.person_id)), 0), 1) AS retention_pct
  FROM franchise_cast f1
  JOIN franchise_cast f2 ON f2.franchise = f1.franchise 
    AND f2.installment_nr = f1.installment_nr + 1
  GROUP BY f1.franchise, f2.title, f2.production_year, f2.movie_id
)
SELECT ip.franchise, ip.sequel_title, ip.sequel_year, ip.retention_pct,
       mii.info::numeric AS sequel_rating
FROM installment_pairs ip
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = ip.sequel_id
  AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
ORDER BY ip.franchise, ip.sequel_year;

WITH franchise_ids AS (
  SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year,
    CASE 
      WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 'Halloween') AND t.production_year IN (1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009) THEN 'Halloween'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa') THEN 'Rocky'
      WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
    END AS franchise,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 
      CASE 
        WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 'Halloween') AND t.production_year IN (1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009) THEN 'Halloween'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa') THEN 'Rocky'
        WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
      END
      ORDER BY t.production_year) AS installment_nr
  FROM title t
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year >= 1980
),
-- Only top-10 billed actors (nr_order 1-10)
franchise_leads AS (
  SELECT fi.franchise, fi.movie_id, fi.title, fi.production_year, fi.installment_nr,
         ci.person_id
  FROM franchise_ids fi
  JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = fi.movie_id
  JOIN role_type rt ON rt.id = ci.role_id AND rt.role IN ('actor', 'actress')
  WHERE fi.franchise IS NOT NULL
    AND ci.nr_order BETWEEN 1 AND 10
),
installment_pairs AS (
  SELECT 
    f1.franchise,
    f1.installment_nr AS inst1,
    f2.installment_nr AS inst2,
    f1.title AS title1,
    f2.title AS title2,
    f1.production_year AS year1,
    f2.production_year AS year2,
    f2.movie_id AS sequel_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f1.person_id) AS leads1,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f2.person_id) AS leads2,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f1.person_id = f2.person_id THEN f1.person_id END) AS shared_leads,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f1.person_id = f2.person_id THEN f1.person_id END) 
          / NULLIF(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT f1.person_id), COUNT(DISTINCT f2.person_id)), 0), 1) AS lead_retention_pct
  FROM franchise_leads f1
  JOIN franchise_leads f2 ON f2.franchise = f1.franchise 
    AND f2.installment_nr = f1.installment_nr + 1
  GROUP BY f1.franchise, f1.installment_nr, f2.installment_nr, f1.title, f2.title, f1.production_year, f2.production_year, f2.movie_id
)
SELECT ip.franchise, ip.title1, ip.year1, ip.title2, ip.year2,
       ip.leads1, ip.leads2, ip.shared_leads, ip.lead_retention_pct,
       mii.info::numeric AS sequel_rating
FROM installment_pairs ip
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = ip.sequel_id
  AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
ORDER BY ip.franchise, ip.year1;
